CustomField.description: The applicable attempt numbers in semi-colon separated value e.g., 1;2;3. This is used to match the Individual Enrollment's Attempt Number.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The applicable attempt numbers in semi-colon separated value e.g., 1;2;3. This is used to match the Individual Enrollment's Attempt Number.
CustomField.label: Applicable for Attempt Number
